turn_info.content: What suggestions do you have for unruly kids who argue when their parent need quiet in their respective offices because we work at home?

results.term: I'm thinking of taking away devices, but then Coro...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: I'm thinking of taking away devices, but then Corona is still here. I feel that is very mean considering they are already stressed being in doors.

results.term: Talking is great when we are doing it and they all...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: Talking is great when we are doing it and they all agree. But it never stays this way.

turn_info.content: I feel that is abusive when I know how bad they are being affected psychologically. I actually feel like just locking them in their rooms until we get done working. Kind of like being grounded....

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: I appreciate your support and maybe I will take them to the park where we all play family games but just with us four. They really love to do that. I think that they want attention from us more because we are right here.

turn_info.content: Or maybe we'll have a picnic together.

results.term: They are SUPER happy today of course. Luckily they...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: They are SUPER happy today of course. Luckily they have received the same amount of presents they get any other Christmas because our income has stayed the same. These kids do not know how lucky they are right now. Maybe I can stress that to them a well. They need to know they have a lot to be grateful for.

turn_info.content: Thanks for your ear and your help! I hope you have an awesome christmas and please stay safe!
